nodes.context: A powerful 'Ndrangheta clan based in Rosarno, Calabria, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and control of commercial businesses.
A criminal and mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy, of which the Pesce 'ndrina is a clan.
An 'Ndrangheta clan allied with the Pesce clan, jointly controlling port activities in Gioia Tauro.
An 'Ndrangheta clan that collaborated with Pesce and Bellocco clans in controlling public contracts and port activities.
An 'Ndrangheta clan listed as an ally of the Pesce clan.

edges.context: The Pesce 'ndrina is a clan (sub-group) of the 'Ndrangheta.
The Pesce and Bellocco clans jointly controlled port activities and were involved in drug trafficking together.
The Pesce clan collaborated with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina in controlling public contracts for the container terminal.
The Mancuso 'ndrina is listed as an ally of the Pesce clan.
